gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/299)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/299)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ تَرَكَ الْخَمْرَ صِيَانَةً لِنَفْسِهِ سَقَاهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنَ الرَّحِيقِ الْمَخْتُومِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ibrahim Bin Is’haq, from Abdullah Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Mihzam who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The one who leaves the wine, doing it for himself, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Quench him from the sealed nectar’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ibrahim ibn Ishaq, from ‘Abd Allah ibn Ahmad, from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd Allah, from Mehzam who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘If one refrains from drinking wine for his own protection Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, will provide him drink from the sealed wine of the garden (paradises).”’
